paragraphs: I'm a product designer focused on creating intuitive and elegant digital experiences. With a background in UX strategy, visual design, and product thinking, I help teams transform complex systems into clear, human-centered products. I've worked as a founding designer on fintech and consumer apps, shaping products from discovery to launch.
